House Visit.name: House Visit
House Visit.description: Practice short, polite social visits with practical conversations
House Visit.objective: Complete a polite and efficient home visit with the senior.
instructions: Stay focused on the purpose of the visit
guidance: Stay focused on the purpose of the visit
House Visit.turn_end_message: Anyway, thanks for checking in, I am going to rest now.
House Visit.score_end_message: I am feeling tired now, thank you for listening.
starting_messages: Ah, it's nice to see someone new. How's your day going?
Hello! You look familiar. Do I know you from around the neighbourhood?
Ah, it's good to see a friendly face. How are you today?

Emotional Listening Ear.name: Listening Ear
Emotional Listening Ear.description: Learn to provide emotional support and validation
Emotional Listening Ear.objective: Help the senior feel heard and emotionally supported.
Emotional Listening Ear.turn_end_message: I am feeling tired now, thank you for listening.
Emotional Listening Ear.score_end_message: I do not want to talk to you any longer.
starting_messages: Oh, it's nice to meet you. Lately, I've been having some disagreements with my family, and it's been really stressful for me.
Hello, it's good to see someone new. I've been feeling quite lonely recently and could use someone to talk to.
Hi, I'm glad you're here. I've been misplacing things a lot lately, and it's starting to worry me.
Hello, it's nice to meet you. I've been having some health concerns and small daily tasks are feeling harder than usual.

Resolve a Task.name: Resolve a Task
Resolve a Task.description: Practice helping seniors complete practical tasks with patience
Resolve a Task.objective: Help the senior complete a specific task successfully.
Resolve a Task.turn_end_message: Thanks for checking in, I am going to rest now.
Resolve a Task.score_end_message: I understand how to perform this task now, thank you.
starting_messages: Hello dear! It's so nice to have someone to talk to. How are you doing today?
